channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
item.description: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Half of that bunch is heading to public markets in the same window, and it’s a stress test for investors, for valuations, and for […]...

item.title: Guerre des caméras de poche : DJI veut faire interdire la Luna d’Insta360
item.description: DJI attaque Insta360 en justice aux États-Unis pour ses caméras Luna et réclame leur interdiction de vente. Insta360 a déjà contre-attaqué.

item.title: How to watch The Alien Autopsy Scandal online – stream documentary from anywhere
item.description: Sky’s new UFO documentary will have you looking out for aliens - here’s how to watch it anywhere

item.title: Lenovo casse le prix de son Legion 5i 15 avec RTX 5070 et 32 Go, la config idéale pour jouer en 1440p
item.description: Avis aux gamers, le Lenovo Legion 5i 15 (Gen 10) avec RTX 5070 est aujourd'hui proposé pour seulement 1 357,56 euros au lieu de 1 599 euros sur la boutique officielle de la marque.

item.title: J’ai essayé la Leapmotor B05 : vendue 15 000 € moins chère qu’une Peugeot E-308, que vaut cette voiture électrique chinoise ?
item.description: Présentée début 2026, la Leapmotor B05 débarque dans un segment typiquement européen : celui des berlines compactes. Pour se défendre, cette voiture électrique chinoise veut mettre en avant son comportement dynamique et son rapport qualité / prix attractif. Vous allez le voir dans notre essai et avec notre avis, elle pourrait bien inquiéter Peugeot ou Volkswagen. ...

item.title: OpenAI's latest acquisition could see big changes on the way for its Codex coding assistant
item.description: OpenAI to snap up Ona, subject to approval, giving Codex access to the right environment for long-running agentic tasks.

item.title: Identity theft protection and digital privacy shouldn't break the bank — this Norton LifeLock Advanced deal secures your identity for less
item.description: Norton LifeLock is 16% off right now, so secure your identity for less than $17 per month

item.title: How to watch Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina: Free Streams & TV Channels as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts begin campaign
item.description: Here's how to watch Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina for free online and from anywhere as the FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts begin their Group B campaign.

item.title: Looking for simple antivirus protection that doesn't break the bank? — Norton Antivirus Plus is the lightweight protection package I have always dreamed of
item.description: Pick up Norton Antivirus Plus for just £25 in this limited time deal

item.title: SpaceX entre en bourse : SPCX s’envole et propulse Elon Musk premier trillionnaire de l’histoire
item.description: SpaceX a fait ses débuts ce 12 juin sur le Nasdaq. La cotation a démarré à 166,64 dollars l'action à 17h55, soit environ 23 % au-dessus de son prix d'introduction. De quoi propulser Elon Musk au rang de premier trillionnaire de l'histoire, au moins sur le papier.

item.title: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX’s historic IPO
item.description: The SpaceX IPO has boosted Musk's paper wealth to more than $1,000,000,000,000 at a time when he is more hated -- and powerful -- than ever.

item.title: SpaceX opens at $150, an 11% pop for the most anticipated debut in history
item.description: The company made its heavily-anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs TV ? Notre sélection en 2026 pour bien choisir
item.description: Vous recherchez le meilleur TV pour votre salon ? Entre les innovations d'affichage et la multitude de références, trouver le meilleur téléviseur adapté à vos besoins et à votre budget peut s'avérer complexe. Pour vous guider, nous avons comparé et analysé les technologies incontournables du moment : OLED, QLED, QD-OLED et LED.

item.title: 'The people have spoken': fans rejoice as Resident Evil Veronica hits a million wishlists on PS5 and PC just under a week after its announcement
item.description: Capcom has delivered some of the best hits across multiple of its well known franchises, and Resident Evil Veronica may very well continue the trend.

item.title: PixelRAG beats text parsers on accuracy and cuts AI agent token costs 10x
item.description: Most enterprise RAG pipelines start the same way: a text parser converts web pages and documents into plain text so they can be chunked and indexed for retrieval. That conversion step destroys retrieval signals — and according to new research, it's responsible for the majority of wrong answers.A research team from UC Berkeley, Princeton University, EPFL and Databricks published a paper this week introducing PixelRAG, a system that skips that conversion entirely. Instead of parsing pages into text, PixelRAG renders them as screenshots, indexes those images and feeds retrieved tiles directly to ...

item.title: Justin Bieber just teased new Bluetooth speakers under his SKYLRK brand and actually, they look like something I wish B&O would do
item.description: Like baby, baby, baby no — these really are Justin Bieber speakers and headphones.

item.title: FIFA World Cup schedule today: Games, kickoff times, livestream info for June 12
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the FIFA World Cup on June 12, including today's schedule, kickoff times, livestream information.

item.title: Recharge des voitures électriques : une association française dénonce une « loterie tarifaire »
item.description: La CLCV dénonce une « loterie tarifaire » pour la recharge des voitures électriques en France, soulignant un manque de clarté dans les tarifs. L’association nationale de défense des consommateurs a ainsi constaté des écarts de prix conséquents selon les bornes, les régions et les modes d'accès.

item.title: The Pentagon and Pete Hegseth are facing a lawsuit from 9 renewable energy groups. Here’s why
item.description: Groups filed a lawsuit in Oregon against the Pentagon and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth over wind farm reviews. Renewable energy groups are suing the U.S. military because they say national security reviews for new wind farms on private land have been effectively frozen for months. The groups say this logjam jeopardizes $47 billion in investments and thousands of jobs in 21 states.President Donald Trump has frequently talked about his hatred of wind power and calls turbines ugly. Currently, about 10% of the electricity generated in the United States comes from wind farms, making it the nat...

item.title: Explosive Lioness season 3 trailer proves why it's the most underrated Taylor Sheridan show on Paramount+ — as August 2026 release date is confirmed
item.description: We're less than two months away from Taylor Sheridan's army action series hitting our screens — and judging by the Lioness season 3 trailer, it'll be explosive.

item.title: SpaceX IPO today: How volatile trading could impact your 401k retirement account—and why investors are worried
item.description: The broader stock market effects of the Elon Musk-led company’s huge public debut may be nearly unavoidable. SpaceX is going public, and its shares could go to the moon. That doesn’t mean that all investors are starstruck, however. That’s because for many investors, SpaceX’s IPO, and its effects on the broader market, may be nearly unavoidable.

item.title: 160,000 lbs. of this frozen pizza product are being recalled due to potential metal fragment contamination
item.description: A popular Farm Rich product sold at Walmart, Lidl, Dollar General and other retailers may contain metal pieces. If you’re a pizza lover, you’ll want to be aware of a recent recall the US Food and Drug Administration has announced. The recall involves over 160,000 pounds of a popular frozen pizza product sold at major retailers in more than 20 states. The reason for the recall? Potential metal contamination. Here’s what you need to know....

item.title: Spyro: A Realm Beyond studio CEO says there was no 'pushback' to becoming independent from Activision Blizzard, but the process and planning the game at the same time was 'complex' — 'I think that was the biggest challenge'
item.description: Toys for Bob has said there was no "pushback" from Activision Blizzard when it chose to become independent, but the process was "complex."

item.title: Cet immense TV QD-OLED Samsung de 77 pouces noté 9/10 voit enfin son prix dégringoler
item.description: Avec l’arrivée des nouvelles gammes Samsung, le modèle précédent 77S95F s'affiche en forte baisse. Ce téléviseur QD-OLED haut de gamme de 77 pouces passe ainsi de 3 199 euros à 2 479 euros chez Joybuy.

item.title: Where to score FIFA World Cup food deals this summer: Grubhub, Buffalo Wild Wings, McDonalds, and more
item.description: Where you can score food specials for the FIFA World Cup 2026, including McDonald's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Grubhub, and more.

item.title: NordVPN’s next-gen antivirus aces independent testing with a 96% phishing block rate
item.description: NordVPN's next-generation antivirus has just blocked 96% of phishing sites in an independent AV-Comparatives test, proving the privacy app is a formidable all-in-one security suite.

item.title: Meta outage: Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp experience downtime
item.description: Multiple Meta products saw service outages on Friday morning.

item.title: Govee’s rechargeable smart table lamp is down to $60
item.description: Whether you’re planning a backyard barbeque or a World Cup watch party, Govee’s Table Lamp Classic can help set the mood with color-changing lighting effects. Right now it’s down to just $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, which is its best price yet. The rechargeable lamp can last up to 30 hours on a single charge, […]

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A27 officialisé : un petit coup de fraîcheur
item.description: Samsung présente officiellement le Galaxy A27 5G en Europe. Le téléphone profite d'un look plus moderne et d'une nouvelle puce.

item.title: Markets and oil prices react to Trump’s claims of a breakthrough in peace talks with Iran
item.description: Brent crude dropped 4.5% to $86.31 per barrel. World shares advanced on Friday, tracking big Wall Street gains, while oil prices sank more than 4% after U.S. President Donald Trump claimed there was a breakthrough in talks to end the Iran war.High oil prices have added to inflationary pressures globally as the Strait of Hormuz, a key waterway for the world’s oil and gas transit, remained largely closed.Expectations that an agreement between the U.S. and Iran may help reopen the strait sent oil prices tumbling.Brent crude oil, the international standard, fell 4.5% to $86.31 per barrel. That wa...

item.title: How to watch World Cup 2026 online from anywhere: Free Streams, TV Channels and Fixtures
item.description: Here's how you can watch FIFA World Cup 2026 live streams for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: I held the Trump phone
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. We don't have the phones we preordered yet, but this week included an unexpected in-person encounter with the T1. You see a lot of interesting phones when you're among tech […]

item.title: Facebook and Instagram appear to be down
item.description: Facebook, WhatsApp and Instagram appear to down for many users this morning.

item.title: New BBC drama The Split Up is the 'high-pressure' spinoff of hit Nicola Walker legal drama we've been waiting for — and its trailer feels even more dramatic
item.description: If you loved hit BBC legal drama The Split starring Nicola Walker, new spinoff series The Split Up looks unmissable — and so is its new trailer.

item.title: 'This is an important release' — Amnezia VPN strengthens its apps to fight Russia's new approach to VPN blocking in latest update
item.description: "We have no intention of giving in to the difficulties," said Amnezia's founder, as the team fixed a bug in its latest update to thwart the newest censorship methods allegedly adopted by Russia's media regulator Roskomnadzor.

item.title: We’re teaching AI to be evil
item.description: And we’re going to blame it when it is. Recently, Anthropic quietly admitted something that should have been the biggest tech story of the year.

item.title: 'For Spyro: A Realm Beyond, we are very much focused on making it an accessible adventure' — Toys for Bob wants the next Spyro game to be an 'approachable entry' in the series
item.description: Toys for Bob wants Spyro: A Realm Beyond to be an "approachable" new entry in the series, for both long-time fans and new players.

item.title: Should you buy a robot vacuum before Prime Day? I test them for a living and found some early deals to eye.
item.description: Some of my top robot vacuum recommendations are on sale two weeks before Prime Day, like the Eufy C28 and Shark UV Reveal 2-in-1.

item.title: Fonctionnant sans montre connectée, la ceinture cardiofréquencemètre Garmin pour les sportifs passe à -41%
item.description: La Garmin HRM 600 est une ceinture cardiofréquencemètre pour la course à pied, le vélo, la natation et les sports d'intérieur que vous retrouvez à 99 euros au lieu de 169 euros sur Rakuten.

item.title: Des pubs dans vos jeux vidéo : Xbox y pense pour éviter les hausses de prix
item.description: Payer son abonnement et regarder des réclames entre deux parties : le nouveau stratège de Xbox y voit un moyen de garder des prix doux. Les abonnés apprécieront la délicatesse.

item.title: The gender data gap and the need for representation in AI
item.description: What is often overlooked is that mitigating AI gender bias starts with the data itself.

item.title: SpaceX’s massive IPO: all the latest news
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO on Friday allows the public to buy shares of the combined rocket, AI, and social media company for the first time, and is raising enough money to likely make Elon Musk the first trillionaire. He’ll have more wealth, on paper at least, than the economies of nations like Ireland, Sweden, or his home […]

item.title: SpaceX entre en Bourse : l’histoire folle d’une start-up d’Elon Musk devenue géant du spatial
item.description: SpaceX n'a pas toujours été l'empire industriel dirigé par un militant d'extrême-droite mégalo que l'on connaît aujourd'hui. Avant d'atteindre les sommets dans le domaine de l'aérospatial, l'entreprise avait commencé comme beaucoup d'autres.
